elements.image_prompt: professional 2D minimalist icon, pure white background, clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients

elements.original_description: A cheerful cartoon character holds a piggy bank with coins falling into it, smiling with relief. The background is pure white, emphasizing the character and piggy bank. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A cheerful cartoon character holds a piggy bank with coins falling into it, smiling with relief. The background is pure white, emphasizing the character and piggy bank. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks. Professional 2D minimalist icon, clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, pure white background, cheerful and relieved mood.
